TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Saba'tu, title = Saba'tu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saba'tu} }

S.FORM: == satangahan : == Saba'tu u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam : u canan ku Saba'tu(Saba'tu是什麼?)ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː saba'tu sawac
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == sabaʔ~ʡtu u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam : u ʦanan ku sabaʔ~ʡtu(sabaʔ~ʡtu***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * sabaʔ~ʡtu sawaʦ
S.FORM: == satangahan : == Saba'tu u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam : u canan ku Saba'tu(Saba'tu是什麼?)ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː saba'tu sawac
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == sabaʔ~ʡtu u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam : u ʦanan ku sabaʔ~ʡtu(sabaʔ~ʡtu***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * sabaʔ~ʡtu sawaʦ
